title: rcql fails on uses: security-and-quality in codescanning-config
description: Observed in Biblicus: codeql database create fails resolving language-security-and-quality packs during DB creation. Implement user-friendly handling in run-codeql without breaking existing projects.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Investigated failure path: database creation fails when codescanning config contains queries: uses: security-and-quality. Plan is to sanitize config for database create by removing query-selection keys while preserving path filters, then add tests to prevent regressions.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented config sanitization for database creation: rcql now strips top-level query selectors (queries/packs/query-filters) from codescanning config before calling codeql database create, while preserving path filters. Added tests in tests/test_scanner_config.py. Validation: pytest -q (120 passed), make check, plus Biblicus smoke runs: rcql --lang actions --no-fail --quiet and rcql --lang python --no-fail --quiet both succeeded.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented and shipped in commit 2dcaf72: sanitize code scanning config for database creation and added regression tests.
